channel.description: Recent content in Real Estate Investing on MinWeb

item.title: Buying Your Elderly Neighbor’s Home: Risks and Realities
item.description: Thinking of buying your elderly neighbor's home? Learn the complex legal, financial, and emotional risks involved before you commit to this unique investment.

item.title: Why Your Landlord Should Sell to You at a Discount
item.description: Learn how to negotiate a discount on your rental property by showing your landlord how they can save thousands in agent commissions and fees through a direct...
